summary: Good modular TypeScript with proper types and workflow structure. Gaps: no input validation for config/mockDb (malformed JSON risks confusing errors); bash script lacks `set -euo pipefail`; missing explanatory comments; only package.json parser implemented (task mentions 'or similar'). Error handling in index.ts lines 36-38 has no try/catch. Otherwise: solid separation of concerns, injectable LicenseLookupFn, clear types, proper workflow permissions.
